title: Missing Keyboard indicator after closing RDP
author: 7OH
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->

## Expected Behavior
When i switch between RDP and usual window - keyboard indicator hide or switch - it's normal.

## Current Behavior
When i close RDP connection - keyboard indicator don't show again.
If i shutdown remote rdp - indicator came back working.
If just close tab - it's not shown again.

## Possible Solution
Now i'm going to control panel and switch some settings for indicators to show it back.
(switch ...

iterations.description: RDP ActiveX control suppresses the Windows keyboard/language indicator during a session and does not restore it on disconnect, leaving the taskbar language bar hidden after closing.

comments.author: simonai1254
comments.snippet: Keyboard Indicators means like the light for Caps Lock etc.?

comments.author: 7OH
comments.snippet:
Its label (eng\rus) near clock in tray 
Sorry, that not write correct first time

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

notes:
AI triage (claude): RDP ActiveX control suppresses the Windows keyboard/language indicator during a session and does not restore it on disconnect, leaving the taskbar language bar hidden after closing.
Approach: In the RDP disconnect/closed event handler, post WM_INPUTLANGCHANGEREQUEST or call ActivateKeyboardLayout(GetKeyboardLayout(0), KLF_SETFORPROCESS) via P/Invoke to force Windows to refresh the language bar indicator after the RDP control releases keyboard focus.
